inputs.label: Project Duration (days)
inputs.businessContext: Total planned duration of the roofing project. Based on project scheduling standards (PMI PMBOK).

inputs.label: Historical Weather Delay Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of days historically lost due to weather in the region. Derived from local climate data or industry benchmarks (e.g., NRCA guidelines).

inputs.label: Seasonal Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts delay probability based on season. 'high' for rainy/snowy months, 'low' for dry season. Based on meteorological risk assessment.

inputs.label: Critical Path Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of project duration that is on the critical path and weather-sensitive. From project schedule analysis (CPM).

inputs.label: Daily Cost Rate ($/day)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost per day of delay including labor, equipment, and overhead. Based on contractor's cost data.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data quality. Affects adjustment of final risk estimate. Based on data governance standards.

suggestedActions: if expectedDelayDays > projectDurationDays * 0.2 then 'Consider adding weather contingency buffer to schedule'
if expectedCostImpact > 100000 then 'Evaluate alternative roofing methods or materials to reduce weather sensitivity'
if historicalWeatherDelayRate > 0.3 then 'Review historical data accuracy and consider using more conservative estimates'
